collections.title: Ancient & Epic
collections.description: Begin with epic from the ancient Mediterranean: stories of war, exile and homecoming whose meanings have shifted through translation and retelling.
collections.search: Ancient & Epic Begin with epic from the ancient Mediterranean: stories of war, exile and homecoming whose meanings have shifted through translation and retelling.

collections.title: Renaissance & Early Modern
collections.description: These works ask what a society should be and how power really works.
collections.search: Renaissance & Early Modern These works ask what a society should be and how power really works. They were written amid religious conflict, court politics, travel and the rapid growth of print.

collections.title: Shakespeare
collections.description: Shakespeare’s plays have never stood still.
collections.search: Shakespeare Shakespeare’s plays have never stood still. Read them through early print, the stories they borrowed and centuries of performance, from playhouse to screen.

collections.title: Restoration & Enlightenment
collections.description: The English novel begins to find its form here, in voyages, private letters, satire and fierce public argument.
collections.search: Restoration & Enlightenment The English novel begins to find its form here, in voyages, private letters, satire and fierce public argument.

collections.title: Romantic & Regency
collections.description: Courtship and inheritance shape private lives, while new ideas about authorship, science and society unsettle the world beyond the drawing room.
collections.search: Romantic & Regency Courtship and inheritance shape private lives, while new ideas about authorship, science and society unsettle the world beyond the drawing room.

collections.title: Victorian
collections.description: These novels move from London streets to Yorkshire moors, from drawing rooms to laboratories.
collections.search: Victorian These novels move from London streets to Yorkshire moors, from drawing rooms to laboratories. Again and again, they test the respectable surface of Victorian life.

collections.title: American Classics
collections.description: Three very different journeys take us to sea, into the Civil War and north to the Klondike.
collections.search: American Classics Three very different journeys take us to sea, into the Civil War and north to the Klondike. Each tests what courage, authority and survival look like under pressure.

collections.title: Modern Classics
collections.description: Here twentieth-century political anxiety turns strange: one novel becomes a nightmare chase, the other a farmyard revolution.
collections.search: Modern Classics Here twentieth-century political anxiety turns strange: one novel becomes a nightmare chase, the other a farmyard revolution.
